testsuite.name: com.budgetapp.savings.SavingsRepositoryImplTest

testcase.name: getAllAccounts returns empty list when no accounts
getAccountById returns domain model when found
insertAccount calls dao with correct entity
getAccountById returns null when not found
getAllAccounts maps entities to domain models
